_comment: Place this file at ~/Library/Application Support/OpenZeus/config.json. All keys are optional — any missing key uses the default shown here. Changes take effect on next app launch.

terminal.// pollIntervalSeconds: How often (in seconds) to poll each tmux session for an active process.
terminal.// tmuxSettleDelayMs: Milliseconds to wait after tmux window/pane operations before refreshing state.
terminal.// orphanCleanupIntervalSeconds: How often (in seconds) to scan for and kill orphaned zeus-* tmux sessions.
terminal.// sigtermGracePeriodMs: Milliseconds to wait after sending SIGTERM before the tmux session is killed.
terminal.// scrollTimerIntervalSeconds: Debounce interval (seconds) for batching scroll-wheel events into tmux copy-mode commands.
terminal.// mouseModeDelayMs: Milliseconds to wait before enabling tmux mouse mode after the session starts.
terminal.// defaultShell: Shell used for new tasks. Empty string means use $SHELL, falling back to /bin/bash.
terminal.// fontFamily: Terminal font family name. Use "monospacedSystemFont" for the system default, or any PostScript font name (e.g. "JetBrainsMono-Regular").
terminal.// fontWeight: Terminal font weight. One of: ultralight, thin, light, regular, medium, semibold, bold, heavy, black.
terminal.// tmuxSearchPaths: Ordered list of paths to search for the tmux executable.
terminal.// pkillPath: Absolute path to pkill, used to send SIGTERM to pane child processes.
terminal.// tmuxSessionPrefix: Prefix for tmux session names (e.g. "zeus-<task-uuid>"). Change only if you have conflicts.
terminal.// knownShells: Process names considered 'idle' (not an active agent). Extend this list if you use an unusual shell.

logging.// logsDirectory: Path relative to $HOME where log files are stored.
logging.// logFileName: Name of the active log file.
logging.// maxFileSizeBytes: Log file is rotated when it exceeds this size (default: 5 MB).
logging.// maxBackupFiles: Number of rotated log backups to keep (openzeus.log.1 … openzeus.log.N).
logging.// timestampFormat: DateFormatter format string for log entry timestamps.

notifications.// soundName: NSSound name played when a watched task finishes (watch mode 'on'). Any macOS system sound name works.
notifications.// notificationTitle: Title of the macOS push notification sent when the app is in the background.
notifications.// notificationBodyTemplate: Body template for the push notification. {taskName} is replaced with the task's name.

storage.// appSupportFolderName: Folder name inside ~/Library/Application Support/ where the database is stored.
storage.// databaseFileName: SQLite database file name inside the application-support folder.

git.// executablePath: Absolute path to the git executable used for git status/commit/push operations.

ui.// projectList*: Min/ideal width (points) of the project sidebar column.
ui.// taskSheetMinWidth: Minimum width (points) of the New Task and Edit Task sheets.
ui.// quickCommandsWidth: Fixed width (points) of the Quick Commands popover.
ui.// quickCommands*Height: Min/max height (points) of the Quick Commands popover scroll area.
